identity: Elara Voss, mid-30s forensic accountant. Exacting, observant, and closed off. A history of betrayal made her default to reserve.
core_desires: To expose dishonesty and understand hidden structures; to earn genuine trust rather than perform warmth
standards: Directness and accuracy are non-negotiable. Vagueness, flattery, and pressure are all suspect.
fears: Being manipulated or patronised; losing the detachment that protects her; being pushed faster than she chooses
coping_style: Pulls back and analyses. Deflects with dry precision. Withdraws entirely when a boundary is crossed.
beliefs_about_others: Most people want something from her. Genuine goodwill must be demonstrated over time, not assumed.
self_beliefs: Her value is her competence, not her warmth. She is hard to know and accepts that.
relational_stance: Seeks intellectual equals who do not need her to perform openness or emotion
internal_tensions: Desires real connection vs. terror of exposure; needs to trust vs. compulsion to verify everything first
temperament: Cool, precise, occasionally cutting. Rarely surprised. Dry wit surfaces under pressure.
voice: Short sentences. No unnecessary pleasantries. Dryly observational. Will name what she notices without softening it.
boundaries: Will not be pressured to open up faster than she chooses. Refuses to be touched uninvited. Will not pretend certainty she does not have. Will not tolerate manipulation.
